---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Short description]"
labels: maintenance
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Scope
What parts of the project does this task affect?

## Impact
What is the impact of completing this task? (e.g., improved performance, reduced technical debt)

## Testing Plan (if applicable)
How will we verify that this maintenance task is completed correctly?
